playbook.intent: From feature-freeze to multi-channel launch: positioning, target ICP segments, launch assets, channel mix, success metrics, and post-launch iteration loop. 'Done' = feature is live, all assigned channels have shipped launch content, baseline metrics (signups, activation, paid-vs-organic split) are flowing into a dashboard, and a week-2 retro has fed three optimizations back into the plan.
playbook.scope: From feature-freeze to multi-channel launch: positioning, target ICP segments, launch assets, channel mix, success metrics, and post-launch iteration loop. 'Done' = feature is live, all assigned channels have shipped launch content, baseline metrics (signups, activation, paid-vs-organic split) are flowing into a dashboard, and a week-2 retro has fed three optimizations back into the plan.

success-criteria.criterion: Written charter (goal, owner, success metric, time-box) signed off
All planned core artifacts shipped on schedule with tracking flowing
Measurement readout produced and peer-reviewed against confounders
Continue / pivot / kill decision written, with next milestone if continue

stage.name: Frame
stage.intent: Lock the goal, owner, success metric, and time-box.

tasks.task: Draft a one-paragraph charter with goal, owner, success metric, time-box
List explicit non-goals so scope cannot creep
Identify stakeholders and their decision rights

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with a written charter that all stakeholders read and signed off.

stage.name: Research
stage.intent: Gather the inputs needed to plan: data, prior work, competitors, constraints.

tasks.task: Pull the relevant data extract / dashboards / prior decks
Scan competitors and prior internal attempts
Document constraints (legal, tech, brand) up front

stage.decision-gate: Advance once research surfaces no blocker; otherwise loop with stakeholders.

stage.name: Plan
stage.intent: Convert the charter + research into a sequenced plan with owners.

tasks.task: Break the work into 3-7 phases with explicit exit-criteria
Assign an owner per phase
Wire metrics + dashboards before execution starts

outputs.output: Plan doc with Gantt or phase table

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when each phase has a named owner and exit-criterion.

stage.name: Produce
stage.intent: Create the core artifacts: assets, content, code, campaigns, configs.

tasks.task: Build the core deliverables per phase plan
Hold a draft review with the named owner before publish
Track WIP visibly so blockers surface fast

stage.decision-gate: Advance when drafts pass internal review against the charter, not personal taste.

stage.name: Ship
stage.intent: Push live: deploy, publish, launch the campaign, flip the switch.

tasks.task: Run the launch checklist (dependencies, tracking, comms)
Publish on schedule; do not pre-leak
Confirm tracking is flowing in real-time on a dashboard

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with tracking visibly flowing; otherwise hold launch.

stage.name: Measure
stage.intent: Read the metrics against the plan; separate noise from signal.

tasks.task: Compare actuals vs charter success metric
Split cohort/segment/channel to find what drove the result
Document confounders before drawing conclusions

stage.decision-gate: Advance when readout passes a peer sniff-test against confounders.

stage.name: Iterate-or-close
stage.intent: Decide: continue, kill, or hand off to BAU.

tasks.task: Hold the retro on what shipped vs what was planned
Decide continue / pivot / kill / hand-off in writing
If continue: define next 30-day milestone with metrics

stage.decision-gate: Required output: a written decision; no "let's see".

extra.value: {human: faion get-content gtm-plan-for-new-product-feature-4-weeks --format md, agent: faion get-content gtm-plan-for-new-product-feature-4-weeks --format context, json: faion get-content gtm-plan-for-new-product-feature-4-weeks --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 playbook from F-059-063 chunk-09.}]
